texto: Moons have passed since last we met, battles fought and enemies fallen. At the bridge of Anrag I took fifteen heads. texto: By the way, you haven’t seen an alien around here, have you? About six foot eight with a face like a cross between a boar and an upturned crab. You know him, then?
